Table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

Card of table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

Name

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

Code

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICES

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_CURRENCYISO AS PRICE_CURRENCY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_OFFLINEDATE AS PRICE_OFFLINE_DATETIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_ONLINEDATE AS PRICE_ONLINE_DATETIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_PRICE AS PRODUCT_PRICE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_USERPRICEGROUP AS USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICES

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_PRICES_USERPRICEGROUP

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

CKT_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

drop table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE (
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
PRICE_CURRENCY_CODE TEXT,
PRICE_OFFLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
PRICE_ONLINE_DATETIME DATETIME,
PRODUCT_PRICE DECIMAL,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_ primary key (COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE set comment = 'Reference data entity describing pricing information for a product, including currency, user price groups, pricing periods, and any externally derived price event references, supporting country- or market-specific price management.';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.USER_PRICE_GROUP_BK is
'User Price Group (events_products_prices_userPriceGroup )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.PRICE_CURRENCY_CODE is
'Currency ISO (events_products_prices_currencyIso )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.PRICE_OFFLINE_DATETIME is
'Price Offline Date (events_products_prices_offlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.PRICE_ONLINE_DATETIME is
'Price Online Date (events_products_prices_onlineDate )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.PRODUCT_PRICE is
'Price (events_products_prices_price )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE.ACTIVE_FLAG is
' It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_PRICE

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
